title: Add Isekai Character Generator to games
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Your next life awaits
gist.blurb: Get ready to be reincarnated! The new Isekai Character Generator in our community showcase rolls up fully realized multiversal heroes, complete with stats, backstories, and pixel-perfect looks.
gist.summary: Added the community-built Isekai Character Generator to the apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now explore a new tool that generates complete RPG-style character profiles, stats, and visual appearances.
gist.visual_concept: RPG/Isekai theme. Polly the bee dressed as a fantasy adventurer (wizard hat or cape) interacting with a character sheet or a magical portal, representing the generation of a new multiversal hero.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat and cape, looking excitedly at a glowing retro computer monitor displaying an RPG character stats screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
